---
name: Specification issue
about: Report an ambiguity, error, or gap in the SecureFusion specification
title: '[spec] '
labels: spec
---

**Section / file**
Which spec document and section are you referring to? (e.g. `spec/memo-format.md §5`)

**The issue**
What is unclear, ambiguous, contradictory, or wrong?

**Why it matters**
What might an implementer get wrong because of this? What real-world scenario does it affect?

**Proposed resolution (optional)**
If you have a specific suggestion, share it here. Otherwise leave blank — the maintainers will work with you.

**Have you implemented SecureFusion?**
If yes, briefly describe your implementation context. Implementation experience carries weight in these discussions.
